name: Jiangsu Liance Electromechanical Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Liance Electromechanical Technology Co., Ltd. is a China-based company specializing in the research, development, manufacturing, and sales of industrial automation equipment. Their products include robotic systems, automated assembly lines, and other intelligent manufacturing solutions for various industries. The company is headquartered in Jiangsu, China.
